title: vitis × novae-angliae
intro: Vitis × novae-angliae, also known as the Fox Grape or Nova Scotia Grape, is a hybrid plant species that combines the American Grape (Vitis labrusca) and the European Grape (Vitis vinifera). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are derived from its berries, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of Vitis × novae-angliae include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
